description: Evaluation cases for modern-frontend-design skill v2.0. Tests token systems, liquid glass, hero patterns, and motion spec.

cases.name: AI SaaS Landing Page with Video Hero
cases.prompt: Build a modern landing page for 'Lumina AI' — an AI writing assistant. Use a video background hero, dark indigo/purple palette, and make it look like a well-funded startup product.
cases.stack: React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion
assertions: Defines :root CSS token system with HSL values before any component code
Uses --background, --foreground, --primary as HSL tokens
Implements .liquid-glass utility class in global CSS
Navbar is fixed with liquid-glass styling
Navbar has logo, nav links, and a CTA button
Hero uses <video autoPlay muted loop playsInline>
Hero video has a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-b)
Hero content is z-10 relative to video background
Eyebrow badge uses liquid-glass + rounded-full styling
Headline uses clamp() for fluid font sizing
Headline uses gradient text (bg-clip-text text-transparent)
Hero has negative letter-spacing on headline (-0.03em or tighter)
CTA row has a primary button with glow box-shadow
CTA row has a secondary ghost button
Logo marquee present with infinite scroll animation
Logo items use liquid-glass styling
All Framer Motion animations specify ease as cubic-bezier or named curve
Headline animation has stagger delay after eyebrow
Page has Features section
Page has Pricing section with multiple tiers
Features section uses modern layout (bento or numbered cards)
Pricing uses liquid-glass cards
No hardcoded hex values in component JSX (all via hsl(var(--token)))
Uses TypeScript
No lorem ipsum — realistic AI product copy
Body text max-width constrained (max-w-xl or similar)
Mobile responsive — no horizontal overflow at 375px

cases.name: Developer Tool Hero with Terminal Block
cases.prompt: Build a hero section for 'Axiom' — a developer observability platform. Dark green terminal aesthetic, monospace fonts, include a code/terminal block in the hero.
assertions: Defines :root CSS tokens with monospace primary font
Primary color is green-spectrum (terminal aesthetic)
Implements liquid-glass utility with darker tint than standard
Navbar includes a copy-able npm install command pill
Hero background uses scanline or dot-grid overlay
Terminal block is present in hero (liquid-glass rounded, monospace font)
Terminal block has title bar with colored dots (red/amber/green)
Terminal lines reveal in sequence (animation or appear static with types)
Headline uses monospace or semi-monospace font
Primary accent text is green (not gradient — terminal aesthetic)
Logo marquee brands are developer ecosystem brands (fictional)
No soft rounded corners on cards (sharp 4-8px radius)
CTA buttons use monospace font
No lorem ipsum — realistic devtool copy

cases.name: Fintech SaaS — Light Mode, Trust-First
cases.prompt: Build a landing page hero for 'Clearpath' — a business expense management platform. Professional, trustworthy. Light mode. Include a floating dashboard card on the right side.
assertions: Light mode design — --background is near-white (L > 90%)
Primary color is professional blue (not purple, not green)
Radius is conservative (6-10px) — sharp/professional feel
Navbar is light with subtle border-bottom
Hero layout is two-column (text left, dashboard mockup right)
Dashboard card is floating (liquid-glass or card shadow)
Dashboard card shows financial data (balance, delta, chart, or transactions)
Trust badge present (SOC 2, PCI, encryption mention)
Trust row under CTA (checkmarks + security features)
Headline does NOT use gradient text — plain bold text-foreground
Social proof shows logos of enterprise-sounding companies
Light-mode liquid-glass uses rgba(255,255,255,0.80) or similar
No neon glow effects — shadows are subtle and desaturated
No lorem ipsum — realistic financial product copy
All colors via hsl(var(--token))

cases.name: Wellness App — Soft Light, Mobile-First
cases.prompt: Build a hero for 'Bloom' — a sleep and wellness tracking app. Soft sage green palette, light mode, include a phone mockup showing the app UI.
cases.stack: React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion
assertions: Light/soft background (sage green-tinted white)
Primary color is sage/mint green (not neon)
Radius is generous (16-24px) — soft consumer feel
Two background blobs using radial-gradient with blur filter
Blob animation: slow float (8s+ ease-in-out infinite)
Hero layout: text left, phone mockup right
Phone mockup present (tall aspect ratio, rounded corners, border)
Phone mockup shows wellness data (sleep score, rings, or similar)
Soft light-mode liquid-glass on featured elements
Headline is warm and human (not technical)
No gradient text on headline — plain text-foreground or --primary accent word
App store badges or download CTA present
Social proof shows user count or media logos
Copy matches wellness category (calming, human, encouraging)
prefers-reduced-motion respected
Touch targets ≥ 44px on mobile

cases.name: SaaS Pricing Page — Interactive Toggle
cases.prompt: Build a pricing page for a SaaS product called 'Forma AI'. Three tiers: Free, Pro ($29/mo or $24/mo yearly), Enterprise (custom). Monthly/yearly toggle with animated price switching.
assertions: Defines :root CSS token system
Implements liquid-glass utility
Pricing section header has eyebrow + headline + subhead
Monthly/Yearly toggle is present
Toggle uses liquid-glass styling with active pill animation
Pro/yearly shows savings badge (e.g. 'Save 20%' or 'Save $X')
Three pricing tiers visible (Free, Pro, Enterprise minimum)
Pro/featured card has visually distinct styling from other cards
Featured card uses gradient border or stronger glow
Featured card has 'Most Popular' or equivalent badge
Price numbers animate when toggle switches (Framer layout or CSS transition)
Each tier has a feature checklist with checkmark icons
Feature items use consistent icon + label pattern
Pro features include 'Everything in Free +' or equivalent
CTA buttons differ by tier (ghost, primary, outline)
Enterprise tier has 'Talk to sales' or custom CTA
FAQ accordion section below pricing cards
FAQ uses smooth height animation on expand/collapse
No lorem ipsum — realistic SaaS pricing feature descriptions

cases.name: Creative Agency — Editorial Bold Typography
cases.prompt: Build a hero for 'Forma Studio' — a creative design agency. Bold editorial style, warm dark palette, oversized mixed typography. Should feel like an Awwwards-winning site.
assertions: Warm dark background (warm near-black, not cool dark)
Primary accent is warm (copper, amber, gold — not indigo/blue)
Warm-tinted liquid-glass used for navbar and badges
Serif or display font used for hero headline
Headline is oversized (80px+) with tight leading (≤ 1.0)
Headline mixes italic and non-italic weights
Headline does NOT use standard left-text-right-visual layout
Layout is editorial — asymmetric, unexpected
Grain texture overlay present (opacity 0.03-0.05)
Radial warm glow on background
Services or disciplines listed (minimal, tasteful)
Horizontal rule or divider used as design element
Color contrast passes 4.5:1 for body text
Typography hierarchy uses display → heading → caption levels
Copy has creative personality (not generic SaaS voice)
No generic Bootstrap-looking elements

cases.name: Token System Compliance Audit
cases.prompt: Build a dashboard homepage for a project management SaaS tool. Include sidebar nav, metric cards, an activity chart, and a task table.
assertions: Complete :root token system defined in global CSS or layout file
All background colors use hsl(var(--background)) or hsl(var(--surface))
All text colors use hsl(var(--foreground)) or hsl(var(--foreground-muted))
All border properties use hsl(var(--border)) or hsl(var(--border-subtle))
All border-radius values use var(--radius-*) tokens
All transition durations use var(--dur-*) tokens
Zero hardcoded hex values in any component file
Zero hardcoded rgba values in any component (all via hsl token opacity)
Sidebar navigation present with icon + label pattern
Sidebar has section grouping
Metric cards show KPI data with trend indicator
Metric card trend uses --success (green) for positive, --error (red) for negative
Chart component present (recharts, chart.js, or SVG)
Table present with sortable columns and realistic data
Loading skeleton states defined for cards and table
Empty state defined for the table
Mobile: sidebar collapses to a drawer or bottom nav

scoring.description: Each assertion is independently evaluated as PASS or FAIL. Final score = passed / total assertions.
